translated: LieRadio is always the first one to celebrate,
every single year. I'm so happy.
And that's all for this episode of Love Live! Superstar!! Yuigaoka Girls' Lunchtime Broadcast Station Liella!.
Your hosts were Date Sayuri, the voice of Shibuya Kanon,
Sakakura Sakura, the voice of Onitsuka Tomari, and Yabushima Akane, the voice of Yoneme Mei.
